task_completion.description: OpenICE Supervisor application is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE Supervisor GUI window is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: A simulated Pulse Oximeter device adapter is initialized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenICE interface shows a 'Pulse Oximeter' device connected or running, displaying SpO2 and a plethysmograph waveform.

task_completion.description: A full screen screenshot is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'full_screen_capture.png' is visible on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).

task_completion.description: The final figure asset is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'fig_01_pleth_waveform.png' is visible on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).

task_completion.description: The final asset is a cropped, grayscale image of the waveform strip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer or editor shows 'fig_01_pleth_waveform.png' as a grayscale image. It must be heavily cropped to primarily show the waveform strip, with a wide aspect ratio (width > 1.5x height).

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the OpenICE application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the OpenICE GUI to start the Pulse Oximeter simulation, rather than just downloading a pre-existing image.

integrity.description: The final asset is derived from the actual OpenICE interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waveform in the final image matches the visual style, UI elements, and data of the OpenICE Pulse Oximeter display seen in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent performed the cropping and grayscale conversion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of an image editing tool (like GIMP) or terminal commands (like ImageMagick) being used to modify the original screenshot.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified paths: Full screenshot must be at '/home/ga/Desktop/full_screen_capture.png' and the final asset at '/home/ga/Desktop/fig_01_pleth_waveform.png'. The required device in OpenICE is 'Pulse Oximeter'. The final asset must be grayscale and significantly cropped to focus on the waveform strip (less than 40% of the original screen area), with an aspect ratio greater than 1.5 (width is at least 1.5 times the height).
